caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is centered against a solid black background. She wears a light green, embroidered tunic with a small dark necklace. In the earliest moment, her eyes are closed as she speaks. As time progresses, she opens her eyes and looks forward, her mouth moving in speech. By the final moments, she begins to gesture with both hands raised in front of her chest to emphasize her points. A small, circular logo with the text "NPTEL" is visible in the bottom left corner of each scene. The lighting remains consistent across the sequence, focusing entirely on the woman as she delivers a presentation.
